## Performance Issue
<!-- What is running slow? -->

## Affected Area
- [ ] Frontend (UI/rendering)
- [ ] Backend (API responses)
- [ ] Database queries
- [ ] File loading
- [ ] Other: ___

## Performance Metrics
- **Current Performance**: [e.g., 5 seconds to load]
- **Expected Performance**: [e.g., < 1 second]
- **Impact**: [e.g., 30 QPS degradation]

## Environment
- **Browser/Runtime**: [e.g., Chrome 120, Node.js 18]
- **OS**: [e.g., Windows 11]
- **Network**: [e.g., 4G, WiFi, Fiber]
- **Device**: [e.g., MacBook Pro M1, iPhone 14]

## Reproduction Steps
1. Go to...
2. Perform...
3. Measure...

## Profiling Data
<!-- Include DevTools profiling screenshots or flame graphs -->

```
Performance metrics or logs
```

## Checklist
- [ ] I've profiled the performance issue
- [ ] I can reproduce consistently
- [ ] I've checked for obvious bottlenecks
- [ ] This is not a feature request
